notes: Copy these values into publishing/listing-metadata.json before submission.
Use the same deployed host when replacing __CGF_STATIC_HOST__ in the generated storefront snippet.
Keep status as draft until the production URLs and final branding assets are ready.
Do not place Ecwid secret tokens or the client secret in this file, in browser code, or in GitHub Actions for this static app architecture.
Rotate any previously exposed Ecwid secret token or client secret before public launch.
